value: Hi there, I'm sorry you're running into trouble completing your upgrade order—that's frustrating. I can see you've attached an image of the issue, which is helpful. This sounds like it could be a browser or payment processing glitch. A few quick things to try: clear your browser cache and cookies, try a different browser if you have one handy, or attempt the order on a mobile device if you were using a computer (or vice versa). If you're still stuck after that, please reply with your account email and order details, and we'll investigate further and get this sorted for you right away.
